summary: First iteration end-to-end test of ID9_AGENCY backend + frontend. 22/22 pytest backend tests pass. Frontend public site (Home, Services, Portfolio, Blog, Contact) and Admin (login, overview, portfolio CRUD UI, journal/submissions nav, logout) all functional. Minor data-testid naming mismatch vs spec for some admin nav items and the success-state WhatsApp button.

minor.issue: slugify() strips underscores entirely (e.g. 'TEST_Project_abc' -> 'testprojectabc'). The regex re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9\s-]', '', text) drops underscores before the second regex can convert them to dashes. Slug uniqueness is preserved via uuid suffix, so non-blocking, but the slug becomes harder to read.

issues: Lenis smooth-scroll warning: 'Please ensure that the container has a non-static position, like relative/fixed/absolute to ensure scroll offset is calculated correctly.' — Non-blocking warning logged twice.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Update review-spec docs (or rename testids) to match: admin-nav-journal/admin-nav-submissions/contact-success-whatsapp.
OPTIONAL: Fix slugify() to preserve underscores as dashes — change re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9\s-]', '', text) to re.sub(r'[^a-zA-Z0-9\s_-]', '', text) so underscores get converted by the next step.
OPTIONAL: Wrap Lenis scroll target in a non-static positioned container to silence the warning.
critical_code_review_comments: Auth: bcrypt + HS256 JWT correct; seed_admin is idempotent and updates password if env changes. No httpOnly cookie — token is Bearer-only stored in localStorage (acceptable for admin-only console; OK).
CORS: allow_credentials=False with wildcard origins — fine for current Bearer auth model.
MongoDB: all queries exclude _id correctly; UUID-based string ids used; unique indexes on users.email, portfolio.slug, blog.slug.
No rate limiting / brute-force lockout on /api/auth/login (spec asked for 5-fail lockout — NOT implemented). Acceptable for MVP but worth noting.
Pydantic validation works (422 on missing contact fields).
No file-size concerns; server.py is ~585 lines but cohesive.
Frontend uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL via axios; data-testids on all interactive elements (some names diverge from spec doc but consistent in code).
seed_data_creation: Seed already in place on startup (12 services, 6 portfolio, 4 blog posts, 1 admin). Verified by tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite at /app/backend/tests/test_id9_backend.py. Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml. Admin sidebar uses 'admin-nav-journal' & 'admin-nav-submissions' (not -blog/-contacts). Contact success WhatsApp button has testid 'contact-success-whatsapp'. WhatsApp number is placeholder +15551234567. Portfolio admin list uses testids 'admin-edit-{slug}' / 'admin-delete-{slug}'. No brute-force lockout implemented; no httpOnly cookies (Bearer in localStorage only).
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no blocking bugs found. The only behavioral note is slugify dropping underscores: caused by regex stripping non-alphanumeric-whitespace-hyphen chars before whitespace/underscore/hyphen are normalised. Mitigation: include `_` in the kept-character class.
